goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should 'arrive by 20:45'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'departure time', and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'north' and should be in the type of 'boat'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'address', and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from london liverpool street
The train should leave on thursday and should arrive by 20:45
Make sure you get travel time, departure time, and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the north and should be in the type of boat
Make sure you get phone number, address, and entrance fee
